      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/api/v1/users/{id}",
      "auth": "bearer",
      "description": "Get user by id",
      "responses": ["200", "404"]
    }
  ],
  "findings": [
    {
      "id": "openapi-001",
      "title": "Unauthenticated endpoint exposes user list",
      "severity": "high",
      "type": "missing_authentication",
      "endpoint": "/api/v1/public/users",
      "method": "GET",
      "description": "/api/v1/public/users does not require auth and returns full user roster.",
      "cwe": [306],
      "evidence": "HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\nContent-Type: application/json\\n\\n[{\"id\":1,\"email\":\"alice@example.com\"}]"

      "id": "openapi-002",
      "title": "Possible IDOR on /api/v1/users/{id}",

      "severity": "medium",
      "type": "jwt",
      "endpoint": "/api/v1/auth/login",
      "method": "POST",
      "description": "JWT has no `aud` claim — any service with the same signing key validates the token.",
